---
title: "Christine Gandiya"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme: cosmo
---

## About

I’m a student building skills in data cleaning, exploratory analysis, and predictive modeling with reproducible workflows.

## Featured project

[Predicting Global Video Game Sales](analysis.qmd)

End-to-end workflow on a video game sales dataset: data cleaning + feature engineering, exploratory analysis, and model comparison (linear regression vs. random forest) evaluated with RMSE and $R^2$.

## Links

- [Resume (PDF)](resume.pdf)
- [Cover letter (PDF)](cover-letter.pdf)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/Chris5934/ChrisWebsite)

## Technical skills

- Python (pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, matplotlib)
- Data cleaning, missing-data handling, feature engineering
- Model evaluation (train/test split, cross-validation; RMSE, $R^2$)
- Reproducible reporting (Quarto, Jupyter, conda)
